innateAbility.name: Menace
innateAbility.description: Imbues attacks with an offensive stacking debuff that amplifies incoming damage taken by the affected enemy unit.

abilities.name: Disruption
abilities.description: Sends the hero to the hidden dimension for a short duration.

abilities.name: Disseminate
abilities.description: Whenever the affected unit takes damage, all enemy units, including the target itself if it is an enemy, also receive a portion of that damage.

abilities.name: Shadow Poison
abilities.description: Deals damage in a straight line and applies additional stack damage if the debuff is present.

abilities.name: Shadow Poison Release
abilities.description: Releases the accumulated Shadow Poison from its stacks, dealing damage to all affected enemy units.

abilities.name: Demonic Cleanse
abilities.description: Dispels debuffs continuously on the affected allied unit, then heals it at the end of the duration.

abilities.name: Demonic Purge
abilities.description: Dispels buff and slows the enemy unit for the duration.The unit slowly regains its movement speed until the end of the duration, upon which the cumulative damage is applied.

talents.right: Demonic Purge Applies Shadow Poison Over Time
